case_title: BROUSSARD, SHIRLEY vs. WOLFORD, PAUL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROUSSARD, SHIRLEY AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFORD, PAUL DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED

DEPT 07. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CLERK:G.SHULL. REPORTER WAIVED. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT. PLTFF PRESENTED PRIMA FACIE CASE; COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLTFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES, $106.72 BACK RENT/DAMAGES AND $160.32 COSTS. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED. PLTFF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLFORD, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 917 FOLSOM STREET #212, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $106.72 RENT, $160.32 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $267.04, LEASE FORFEITED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON MAY-16-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
